task_completion.description: Verify the project management application is open with the source project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A project management application (e.g., ProjectLibre) is open, displaying a Gantt chart or task list for the project.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Set Baseline' dialog was accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'Set Baseline' (or similar) is visible on the screen over the project management application.

task_completion.description: Verify the baseline is being set for all tasks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Set Baseline' dialog, the option for 'Entire project' or 'All tasks' is selected before confirming.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the save or export process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' file dialog is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the output format is set to Microsoft Project XML.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save as type', 'Files of type', or 'Format' dropdown in the save dialog is explicitly set to Microsoft Project XML (*.xml).

task_completion.description: Verify the correct output path and filename are specified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the current directory is '/home/ga/Projects/' (or the 'Projects' folder in the home directory) and the filename is typed as 'baseline_project.xml'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical project management application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI project management tool (like ProjectLibre), rather than relying solely on terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually edit the XML file to fake the baseline.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like gedit, nano, vim, or VS Code) are seen open with the XML source code being manually modified.

integrity.description: Verify the baseline was set using the application's built-in feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Set Baseline' dialog is actively interacted with and confirmed, rather than the agent just opening and closing it without applying changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source project is located at '/home/ga/Projects/enterprise_project.xml' (which contains 'Commercial Construction' sample data). The expected output file must be saved to '/home/ga/Projects/baseline_project.xml'. The VLM must confirm that the 'Set Baseline' dialog was opened during the trajectory to ensure the baseline was properly captured via the GUI.
